free_text: A study of the reaction B-10(He3,alpha)B-9
Self-supporting 10B foils, ranging in thickness from
50 to 100 ug/cm2. A mean value of 71+-10 ug/cm2 was
adopted for the target thickness used in the cross
section calculations.
Silicon surface barrier detectors of nominal
resistivity 500 ohm cm and 4000 Ohm cm.
Two counters were used, one being rotated and the other
kept at a fixed angle as a target monitor.
Systematic uncertainty
